notes: This is an owned Cottontail compatibility-test snapshot copied from Bun.
The minimal root package.json preserves Bun's repository package boundary so ancestor package discovery cannot escape into Cottontail's own package.json.
The root tsconfig.base.json is required by test/tsconfig.json and is part of the executable Astro fixture graph.
The bun-plugin-svelte snapshot excludes its own tests and examples; bun-types package metadata is copied to exercise the plugin's local development dependency without vendoring unused declarations.
The Cottontail-owned compat/upstream/cottontail-bun-test-preload.ts gives direct Cottontail test runs an isolated temp root; the importer reapplies its Bunfig reference after refreshing copied files.
Do not edit copied upstream tests in place unless intentionally forking them; document local ownership changes in status.json.
